note: v0.2 MCQ-of-the-day two-gate prototype content. Source: Learn-Product/mvp-content-set-v0.2.md. Studio/general zone, no PHI. Gate-1 = open-book MCQ (auto-marked); gate2 = closed-book recall (self-assessed); ctc = commitment-to-change presets.

modules.title: Dermal fillers
modules.subject: Injectables
modules.source: Pino A, et al. Efficacy and Safety of a New Crosslinked Hyaluronic Acid Dermal Filler for Facial Volume Restoration. Aesthet Surg J Open Forum. 2026;8:ojag082.

gate1.stem: What was the study design and size?
gate1.rationale: 203 volunteers with facial ageing received a single injection of the test filler, with follow-up to 9 months.

gate1.stem: How long was efficacy demonstrated?
gate1.rationale: MFVLS and WSRS improvements were significant at both 6 and 9 months.

gate1.stem: Which outcomes improved significantly at 6 and 9 months?
options: Mid-Face Volume Loss Scale and Wrinkle Severity Rating Scale
gate1.rationale: MFVLS and WSRS both showed statistically significant improvement at 6 and 9 months.

gate2.stem: Roughly how long did a single injection maintain significant mid-face and wrinkle improvement?
gate2.feedback: Significant MFVLS and WSRS gains were sustained at both 6 and 9 months after one injection.

gate2.stem: Which two validated scales improved significantly at 6 and 9 months?
gate2.answer: MFVLS (Mid-Face Volume Loss Scale) and WSRS (Wrinkle Severity Rating Scale).
gate2.feedback: Both showed statistically significant improvement — the efficacy signal rests on these two scales.

ctc.prompt: Change how you counsel patients on HA filler longevity?

modules.title: Neuromodulators
modules.subject: Injectables
modules.source: Huang J, et al. A Real-World Study of Patient and Physician Satisfaction With Repeated AbobotulinumtoxinA Treatment of Glabellar Lines in Chinese Patients. Aesthet Surg J Open Forum. 2026;8:ojag066.

gate1.stem: What was the treatment schedule?
gate1.rationale: Participants received 3 cycles of aboBoNT-A in the glabellar area, 3 to 6 months apart.

gate1.stem: Patient satisfaction 3 weeks after the third injection (primary endpoint)?
gate1.rationale: At 3 weeks after the third injection, 100% of patients were satisfied (very satisfied 71.1%).

gate1.stem: Physician-rated ≥1-grade improvement at maximum frown at 3 weeks?
gate1.rationale: Physicians reported ≥1-grade improvement in ≥90% of patients at 3 weeks in each cycle (≥64% at ~5 months).

gate2.stem: Patient satisfaction 3 weeks after the third cycle?
gate2.feedback: The primary endpoint: every patient satisfied at 3 weeks post-third-injection.

gate2.stem: What interval was used between treatment cycles?
gate2.feedback: Three cycles delivered 3–6 months apart — the real-world re-treatment cadence.

ctc.prompt: Change your glabellar dosing or review interval?

modules.title: Aesthetic breast surgery
modules.subject: Aesthetic breast surgery
modules.source: Aldaghri F. The Impact of Breast Reduction Surgery on Mental Health and Well-Being: A Systematic Review. Aesthet Surg J Open Forum. 2026;8:ojag067.

gate1.stem: How many studies were included, and from how many records?
gate1.rationale: Out of 442 records identified, 7 studies met inclusion criteria.

gate1.stem: What were the consistent psychological findings?
options: Improved self-esteem and body image, reduced depression and anxiety
gate1.rationale: Studies consistently showed improved self-esteem, body image and mental health with reductions in depression and anxiety (p<.05).

gate1.stem: What caveat did the author emphasise?
options: Benefits must be balanced against surgical risks; preoperative psychological evaluation is needed
Results apply only to cancer reconstruction
gate1.rationale: Benefits must be balanced against surgical/ethical considerations, emphasising preoperative psychological evaluation and counselling.

gate2.stem: What were the consistent psychological outcomes after breast reduction?
gate2.answer: Improved self-esteem and body image; reduced depression and anxiety.
gate2.feedback: A consistent direction of benefit across the included studies (p<.05).

gate2.stem: What pre-operative step did the author emphasise?
gate2.feedback: Benefit is real but must be weighed against surgical and ethical considerations — hence pre-op psychological assessment.

ctc.prompt: Change how you discuss psychological benefit when consenting reduction patients?
presets: Yes — add it to my consent

modules.title: Facial rejuvenation surgery
modules.subject: Facial rejuvenation surgery
modules.source: Lee I, et al. Safety Profile of Submandibular Gland Reduction and Parotid-Tail Minimal Shaving in Deep Neck Lifting: A 341-Patient East Asian Series. Aesthet Surg J Open Forum. 2026;8:ojag062.

gate1.stem: How many patients were in the series?
gate1.rationale: 341 consecutive East Asian patients underwent deep neck lifting.

gate1.stem: What was the rate of permanent nerve injury?
gate1.rationale: Transient cervical-branch (1.47%) and marginal mandibular (0.59%) weakness occurred, but no permanent nerve injury was observed.

gate1.stem: What did the authors conclude?
options: Selective salivary-gland reduction during deep neck lifting had low complication rates and appears safe when selectively applied
gate1.rationale: Both SMG reduction and capsule-preserving parotid-tail shaving showed low complication rates.

gate2.stem: In the 341-patient series, what were the permanent nerve-injury rate and the transient marginal mandibular weakness rate?
gate2.feedback: No permanent injuries; only transient, low-rate weakness — the basis for the safety claim.

gate2.stem: Was selective salivary-gland reduction concluded to be safe?
gate2.answer: Yes — low complication rates when selectively applied.
gate2.feedback: Both SMG reduction and capsule-preserving parotid-tail shaving had low complication rates.

ctc.prompt: Change your approach to submandibular fullness in neck lift?

modules.title: Energy devices & skin
modules.subject: Energy-based devices & skin
modules.source: Kumar N, et al. The Efficacy and Safety of Radiofrequency Microneedling for Melasma: A Systematic Review and Qualitative Evidence Synthesis. Aesthet Surg J Open Forum. 2026;8:ojag075.

gate1.stem: Why is radiofrequency microneedling (RFMN) proposed as advantageous for melasma in Fitzpatrick III–V?
options: It targets dermal pathology while minimising epidermal injury, with low post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation
It removes the need for sunscreen
gate1.rationale: RFMN targets dermal pathology while sparing the epidermis, with a low incidence of PIH in darker phototypes.

gate1.stem: How long were improvements in MASI/melanin indices maintained?
gate1.rationale: Improvements were maintained up to 6 months across the 12 included studies.

gate1.stem: Which combination produced greater pigment reduction than monotherapy?
gate1.rationale: Combination with low-fluence Q-switched Nd:YAG produced greater pigment reduction.

gate2.stem: Why is RFMN advantageous in Fitzpatrick III–V skin?
gate2.answer: It targets the dermis while sparing the epidermis → low post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation.
gate2.feedback: Epidermal sparing is the key reason PIH risk stays low in darker phototypes.

gate2.stem: Which laser combination beat RFMN monotherapy for pigment reduction?
gate2.feedback: Adding low-fluence QS Nd:YAG produced greater pigment reduction than RFMN alone.

ctc.prompt: Consider RFMN for melasma in darker phototypes?

modules.title: Body contouring — abdominoplasty + hernia
modules.subject: Body contouring surgery
modules.source: Alaniz L, et al. Combining Abdominal Hernia Repair With Abdominoplasty—Is it Safe? Aesthet Surg J Open Forum. 2026;8:ojag069.

gate1.stem: What was the 30-day surgical-site-occurrence (SSO) rate?
gate1.rationale: SSOs occurred in 3 of 20 patients (15%): 2 seromas (10%) and 1 chronic drainage (5%).

gate1.stem: What was the hernia recurrence rate at a mean 27.3 months?
gate1.rationale: No hernia recurrences were identified at mean follow-up of 27.3 months.

gate1.stem: What is the key limitation of these conclusions?
gate1.rationale: The authors note a limited cohort of carefully selected patients; larger prospective studies are warranted.

gate2.stem: What were the SSO rate and the hernia-recurrence rate at ~27 months?
gate2.feedback: Surgical-site occurrences in 3/20 (15%); no recurrences at mean 27.3 months.

gate2.stem: What is the key limitation when interpreting this?
gate2.feedback: The safety signal is real but fragile — larger prospective studies are warranted.

ctc.prompt: Change whether you combine hernia repair with abdominoplasty?

modules.title: Body contouring — patient preferences
modules.subject: Body contouring surgery
modules.source: Bhatia SS, et al. Perceptions of Female Abdominal Muscle Definition: A Crowdsourced Analysis of Contour Preferences. Aesthet Surg J Open Forum. 2026;8:ojag083.

gate1.stem: Which degree of abdominal etching was rated most attractive overall?
gate1.rationale: 73% found basic contour most attractive, vs 11% moderate and 16% extreme.

gate1.stem: How many responses were analysed?
gate1.rationale: 976 responses were analysed.

gate1.stem: What is the clinical implication for high-definition liposuction?
options: Patient preference skews to less-contoured results — temper extreme etching against what patients actually find attractive
Preference is identical across all groups
gate1.rationale: Respondents across demographics viewed less-contoured abdomens as more attractive than highly contoured ones.

gate2.stem: Which degree of female abdominal etching did most respondents find most attractive?
gate2.feedback: Basic beat moderate (11%) and extreme (16%) by a wide margin.

gate2.stem: What is the implication for high-definition liposuction?
gate2.answer: Temper extreme etching toward what patients actually prefer.
gate2.feedback: Preference skews to less-contoured results — a caution against maximal etching.

ctc.prompt: Temper how aggressively you etch in hi-def lipo?

modules.title: Rhinoplasty (full-text grounded)
modules.subject: Rhinoplasty
modules.source: Bohler F, et al. Fresh Frozen vs Autologous Costal Cartilage in Rhinoplasty: A Meta-Analysis of Complication Rates. Aesthet Surg J Open Forum. 2026;8:ojag072.

gate1.stem: Which two complications were significantly lower with fresh frozen (FFCC) vs autologous (ACC) costal cartilage?
gate1.rationale: Warping 1.2% vs 3.9% (p=.00038) and revision 1.3% vs 3.4% (p=.0029) were significant; infection (p=.34) and resorption (p=.25) were not.

gate1.stem: Infection was 1.7% (FFCC) vs 2.3% (ACC), p=.34 — best interpretation?
gate1.rationale: p=.34 > .05, so the difference is not statistically significant.

gate1.stem: Why caution against calling FFCC definitively superior?
options: Most studies retrospective, serious risk of bias (23/27), short follow-up
gate1.rationale: 23 of 27 studies rated serious risk (ROBINS-I); findings framed as hypothesis-generating.

gate2.stem: Which complications differed significantly between FFCC and ACC, and in which direction?
gate2.answer: Warping and revision were significantly lower with FFCC; infection and resorption were not significantly different.
gate2.feedback: Warping (p=.00038) and revision (p=.0029) favoured FFCC; infection (p=.34) and resorption (p=.25) were NS.

gate2.stem: Why should the FFCC result be interpreted cautiously?
gate2.answer: Mostly retrospective; 23/27 studies at serious risk of bias; short follow-up.
gate2.feedback: The evidence is hypothesis-generating, not definitive — a clean example of statistical signal tempered by risk-of-bias.

ctc.prompt: Will FFCC change your costal-cartilage graft selection?

modules.title: Aesthetic breast — post-MWL
modules.subject: Aesthetic breast surgery
modules.source: Massarwa S, et al. Reshaping the Postbariatric Breast: A Single-center Experience With the Dermal Suspension Parenchymal Reshaping Mastopexy Technique. Plast Reconstr Surg Glob Open. 2026;14(6):e7798.

gate1.stem: What was the cohort size?
gate1.rationale: 8 patients underwent DSPR mastopexy, including 1 unilateral case, for 15 operative breasts.

gate1.stem: What complication occurred?
options: One seroma (6.7%), managed conservatively; no others
gate1.rationale: One minor complication — a seroma in 1 of 15 breasts (6.7%); no other complications.

gate1.stem: What is the main limitation when interpreting the durable results?
gate1.rationale: Despite 5-year median follow-up and high BREAST-Q satisfaction, the series is only 8 patients.

gate2.stem: What were the cohort size and the complication in the DSPR mastopexy series?
gate2.feedback: A single minor seroma, managed conservatively — no other complications.

gate2.stem: What is the main limitation of the durable-result claim?
gate2.feedback: Five-year follow-up and high BREAST-Q are encouraging, but n=8 caps the strength of the claim.

ctc.prompt: Consider DSPR mastopexy for postbariatric patients?

modules.title: Body contouring — waist narrowing
modules.subject: Body contouring surgery
modules.source: Manzaneda Cipriani RM, et al. Waist Reduction Surgery by Rib Incurvation: A New Approach for Waist Narrowing. Plast Reconstr Surg Glob Open. 2026;14(5):e7754.

gate1.stem: How did the two techniques (RibXcar vs IncurvationXribs) compare for efficacy at 6 months?
options: Comparable, significant waist reduction in both
IncurvationXribs far superior on waist size
gate1.rationale: Both achieved significant waist reduction at 6 months with comparable effectiveness.

gate1.stem: How did they differ on safety?
options: IncurvationXribs had less postoperative pain and no complications
gate1.rationale: IncurvationXribs was associated with lower postoperative pain and no complications.

gate1.stem: What complications occurred in the RibXcar group?
options: Two — chronic pain and a bicortical fracture
gate1.rationale: In the RibXcar group, 2 complications occurred (chronic pain and a bicortical fracture).

gate2.stem: How did IncurvationXribs compare to RibXcar on efficacy and safety?
gate2.answer: Comparable waist reduction; less postoperative pain and fewer complications.
gate2.feedback: Efficacy was a wash; IncurvationXribs won on the safety margin.

gate2.stem: What complications occurred in the RibXcar group?
gate2.answer: Chronic pain and a bicortical fracture.
gate2.feedback: Two complications in RibXcar vs none in IncurvationXribs — the safety differentiator.

ctc.prompt: Change your approach to / counselling on waist-narrowing rib procedures?
